newsletters.subject: How I AI: Quests, token leaderboards, and the elite AI adoption playbook & Notion's spec-driven development

Notion spec-driven development segment. Highly actionable for enterprise AI wiki pages.

newsletters.author: Gerald Wong, Sravan Kundojjala (SemiAnalysis)
newsletters.subject: The EDA Primer: From RTL to Silicon
newsletters.reason: EDA (Electronic Design Automation) primer covering RTL to silicon chip design pipeline. Indirectly relevant to AI hardware infrastructure (chip design for AI accelerators), but primarily semiconductor engineering content. SemiAnalysis is a quality source for AI chip analysis. Paywalled - limited scrape access.
actions: Note for future AI accelerator hardware wiki page context
No immediate wiki action needed - too hardware-focused for current AI agent wiki scope
